title: Bot Positioning
description: Ball is loose to one side of the field. A bot must move toward the predicted future contest or pickup zone — not chase the current ball position if it has already moved.

expected_outcomes.description: Bot anticipates where the ball will be and moves there, not where the ball was.

must_not_outcomes.description: Bot moves to the ball's stale last-known position and arrives after the contest has moved.

notes: Bot AI must use predictive positioning (C-005 domain). This scenario validates the AI target selection, not physics.
